## Summary

- What changed and why?

## KB items

- Added:
  - `id: ...`
- Updated:
  - `id: ...`

## Checklist

- [ ] YAML frontmatter present and includes: `id`, `schema_version`, `type`, `status`, `created`, `updated`, `title_vi`, `title_en`, `tags`
- [ ] `id` is unique and stable (no accidental renames)
- [ ] `updated` date is bumped for modified items
- [ ] Vietnamese + English sections exist and are consistent
- [ ] TL;DR is clear and actionable
- [ ] `tags` are meaningful; `aliases` added for common synonyms
- [ ] Examples included (where relevant)
- [ ] Pitfalls / “don’t use when …” included when helpful
- [ ] I have read and will follow the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] My contribution is my original work (or properly attributed) and can be licensed under [LICENSE](../LICENSE)
